subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Most Exalted Horizon and standest firm in the service of the Cause of the Lord of mankind, hearken unto the Call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی الافق الاعلی و القائم علی خدمة امر مولی الوری اسمع الندآء
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
